Please use https://github.com/warrenwoodhouse/forums/labels/maps to report security vulnerabilities.

We use https://github.com/warrenwoodhouse/forums/labels/maps for our intake and triage. For valid issues we will do coordination and disclosure here on GitHub (including using a GitHub Security Advisory when necessary).

The Security Team will process your report within a day and respond within a week (although it will depend on the severity of your report).
